title: SISTERS FARMERS MARKET - 211info
text: SISTERS FARMERS MARKET SISTERS FARMERS MARKET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a farmers market with local fresh produce, meat products, artist's work, and live music in downtown Sisters. 150 North Fir Street Sisters, OR 97759 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Sunday 10am-2pm June-October Email (541) 904-0134 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 904-0134 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by item; accepts SNAP and offers $20 SNAP matching on some food items DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Bend, Fossil, La Pine, Madras, Prineville, Prospect, Redmond,and Sisters TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of Fir Street and Main Avenue. Public transportation one block away. Services: Farmers Markets If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
